summary: Frontend testing for BUG2, BUG5, IMP1, IMP2 features. Logged in as user_a@theprogram.app (strongman user). BUG2, BUG5, and IMP1 all PASS. IMP2 is PARTIALLY IMPLEMENTED - session-detail page exists with correct layout but no navigation path from Schedule tab to it for past completed sessions.

integration_issues.issue: Session-detail page (/session-detail?date=...&sessionType=...) exists with correct SETS/VOLUME/AVG RPE stats row and expandable exercise cards. However, there is NO button or tap target in the Schedule tab's session cards to navigate to it for past completed sessions (non-today). The onGoToSession function has the routing logic (line 853-855 in log.tsx) but is only called from buttons that are NOT rendered for past sessions. Tapping a past completed session card only expands it inline — it does NOT navigate to session-detail.

action_items: IMP2 FIX NEEDED: Add a 'VIEW DETAILS' button (or make the card tap navigate) to session-detail for past completed sessions. In SessionHistoryCard (log.tsx ~line 390-415), add a button for past completed sessions (status==='completed' && !isToday) that calls onGoToSession(). The onGoToSession callback already has the correct router.push('/session-detail?date=...') logic.
IMP2 SECONDARY: session-detail page shows 'No logged exercises found' when loaded without auth context (direct URL). Ensure auth token is passed or retrieved from storage when loading session-detail.
critical_code_review_comments: log.tsx SessionHistoryCard: onGoToSession prop routes to /session-detail for past completed sessions (line 853) but NO button renders for past completed sessions (not today). goBtn only renders for isPremiumToday, continueBtnSmall only renders for isToday+completed. Past sessions have no navigation button.

success_rate.frontend: 75% (3/4 features pass: BUG2, BUG5, IMP1 pass; IMP2 partially implemented)

context_for_next_testing_agent: User user_a@theprogram.app is a strongman user. Login via /auth, click 'Sign in' text link, fill credentials, click at y=498 coordinate for Sign In button. Schedule tab at x=188 on bottom nav. Left arrow at x=36,y=80 navigates to previous week. IMP2 fix needs a VIEW DETAILS button on past completed session cards in log.tsx.

test_results.BUG2: PASS - Today's completed session card shows 'VIEW SESSION' with gray text and dark background (#1A1A1E), NOT gold CONTINUE SESSION
test_results.BUG5: PASS - No boxing exercises (1:1 Boxing Intervals, Shadowboxing, Boxing/Recovery/Mobility) found for strongman user user_a
test_results.IMP1: PASS - Move a session pill shows calendar-arrow-right icon. Banner says 'Tap the session you want to move'. After tapping source training day, banner changes to 'Now tap the destination day (any day)'. Rest days confirmed tappable as destination in code.
test_results.IMP2: PARTIAL - session-detail page /session-detail renders correctly with Heavy Lower header, SETS/VOLUME/AVG RPE stats row (layout correct). BUT no button exists on past completed sessions in Schedule tab to navigate there. Card tap only expands inline.
test_results.app_load: PASS - Home, Today, Schedule render without white screens or JS errors
